field.label: Enable
field.help: Enable NetFlow export to your Flowtriq agent. This starts softflowd on the selected interfaces and exports flow data to the configured ftagent host.

field.label: Agent Host
field.help: IP address or hostname of the server running ftagent. This is where NetFlow data will be sent for DDoS analysis.

field.label: Agent Port
field.help: UDP port that ftagent is listening on for NetFlow data. Default is 2055.

field.label: NetFlow Version
field.help: NetFlow protocol version. Version 9 is recommended as it supports templates and IPv6. Version 5 is available for legacy compatibility.

field.label: Interfaces
field.help: Select the interfaces to monitor for DDoS detection. Typically this is your WAN interface, but you can select multiple interfaces.

field.label: Tracking Level
field.help: Level of flow tracking detail. "Full" captures source/destination IP, port, and protocol for complete attack analysis. "Protocol only" and "IP only" reduce overhead but limit forensic detail.

field.label: Max Flows
field.help: Maximum number of concurrent flows to track. Higher values use more memory but reduce the chance of missing flows under heavy traffic. Default 8192 is suitable for most deployments.
